text: Baby, are you coming Sunday? Dad wants to grill.
Yes! I'll be there by 1. Should I bring anything?
Just yourself. Dad already got the sweet potatoes.
Perfect. I'll call you around noon to check in. Love you.
Gerald, did you take a look at that Greenleaf visit reminder Grace forwarded?
Yes, I have it. Your next appointment is July 8. I'll drive.
Thank you, baby. Don't forget yourself too.
Geri!! Boards are done. DONE. I'm crying in the library.
Rachel!!!! I KNEW you'd crush it. Go eat something celebratory immediately.
Already ordering pizza. Are you proud of me?
Extremely. Call me tonight if you can — Mom will want to hear from you too.
Will do. Love you sis.
Still on for Saturday rehearsal? 10 AM at yours?
Yep, 10 AM. I want to work through the Chet Atkins arrangement before Marcus arrives.
Good call. I've been practicing the bass thumb part — think I finally have it.
Finally! I'll have coffee ready. See you then.
Hey, got some good heritage tomatoes in. Want me to set some aside?
Yes please! I'll swing by Thursday afternoon if that works.
Thursday works. I'll also hold the habaneros — I know you like the spicy stuff.
Marcus — are you bringing the parlor bass or the full-size for Saturday?
Full-size. The parlor doesn't project well enough in Chris's living room.
Makes sense. I'll bring Dorothy's guitar. She really sings in that space.
That guitar is magic. See you Saturday.
G, I wrote a new bridge for October Skies. Can we try it Saturday?
Absolutely. Send me the chord sheet tonight so I can look at it beforehand.
Sent to the CAC group chat. It's pretty simple, mostly IV-I resolution.
Eleanor — just confirming the URISN quarterly call is Thursday at 2 PM ET?
Yes. Bring the draft timeline slides — Meridian wants to see them.
